domain: Zulu/Nguni stick-fighting (Zulu+Xhosa South African indigenous): dual-arm asymmetric — induku (88cm offensive right) + ubhoko (165cm defensive left) + ihawu cowhide shield bound to defense-arm; objective Inkunzi 'Bull' winner; honor + defense prioritised over aggression; ukuqinisa pre-fight purification by traditional healer cleanses body+spirit; boys begin age 7 while herding cattle; rite-of-passage.
specific_mechanism: ZULU-NGUNI-STICK-FIGHTING-INDUKU-OFFENSIVE-UBHOKO-DEFENSIVE-IHAWU-SHIELD-UKUQINISA-PURIFICATION-INKUNZI-BULL-HONOR-CLEAN-FIGHT-ADVERSARIAL-COEVOLUTION: LLM adversarial-coevolution mechanism with (1) asymmetric dual-arm A_2_asym: 2 unequal sub-policies — short-offensive (induku) + long-defensive (ubhoko); (2) shield-bind ihawu I_shield: defense-arm carries auxiliary regularization vector; (3) ukuqinisa pre-fight purification U_purif: explicit cleansing-init reset; healer-LLM role; (4) Inkunzi Bull winner-select B_inkunzi: winner criterion includes honor cleanness; (5) honor-bound clean-fight L_honor: illegal-move penalty added to adversarial reward. Differs from R534 GLIMA, R547 BOKH, R559 CAPOEIRA (ginga sway + 5-feint + berimbau + roda + cooperative-deceptive) by asymmetric dual-arm + shield-bind + ukuqinisa + Inkunzi + honor-clean.
llm_application: ZULU-NGUNI-STICK-FIGHTING-INDUKU-UBHOKO-IHAWU-UKUQINISA-INKUNZI-HONOR LLM mechanism + asymmetric A_2_asym dual-arm + shield I_shield bind + ukuqinisa U_purif purification healer-init + Inkunzi B_inkunzi winner-select honor metric + honor L_honor illegal-move penalty. Differs from R534 GLIMA. R547 BOKH. R559 CAPOEIRA (closest — ginga sway + 5-feint + berimbau + roda + cooperative-deceptive). Differs from Jailbreaking 2026 + AI Assisted Attacks + Baseline Defenses + Unlearning Backdoor by asymmetric dual-arm + shield + ukuqinisa + Inkunzi + honor. Differs by ASYMMETRIC DUAL-ARM + SHIELD-BIND + UKUQINISA PURIFICATION + INKUNZI WINNER-SELECT + HONOR-CLEAN FIGHT.
novelty_claim: Jailbreaking Survey 2026 + AI Assisted Attacks 2026 + Baseline Defenses + Unlearning Backdoor cover adversarial paradigm. ZULU-NGUNI-INDUKU-UBHOKO-IHAWU-UKUQINISA-INKUNZI-HONOR adds (a) asymmetric dual-arm + (b) shield-bind + (c) ukuqinisa + (d) Inkunzi + (e) honor-clean. Recombination — borderline lookup.
